omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Purpose To share data with our service providers, such as those that host data for us, including Amazon Web Services To share data with our affiliates To market our products and services as well as enable third parties to provide advertisements to you via the Application To respond to law enforcement organization, or other government officials where we have a legal obligation, including complying with legal demands and complying with production and court orders. We will notify user of the information request or submission as, and if, allowed. The day to day running and management of the business including to monitor, maintain and improve the processes, information and data, technology and communications solutions and services we use; protect our legal rights and interests; and share such personal information with third parties that acquire or are interested in acquiring all or part of our assets or shares, or that succeeds us in carrying on our business;
